summary: AgentForge v4.5 Modular Routes Testing - All backend endpoints verified (16/16 tests pass). Frontend 3D System Map and Build Farm Panel both rendering correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/ - API root returns version 4.5.0 with build_farm feature
✅ GET /api/health - health check returns 'healthy' with timestamp
✅ GET /api/k8s/status - returns K8s status (k8s_available: false - MOCKED)
✅ GET /api/k8s/queues - returns 4 queues (default, builds, assets, tests)
✅ GET /api/k8s/manifests - returns K8s manifests JSON
✅ GET /api/celery/stats - returns Celery stats (celery_available: false - MOCKED, using memory queue)
✅ GET /api/celery/workers - returns workers object with empty list (Redis not running)
✅ POST /api/celery/jobs/submit - correctly validates project_id (returns 422 for invalid)
✅ GET /api/deploy/platforms - returns 3 platforms (vercel, railway, itch)
✅ GET /api/deploy/config - returns deployment config status
✅ GET /api/audio/categories - returns sfx, music, voice categories with presets
✅ GET /api/assets/types - returns 10 asset types (image, audio, texture, sprite, model_3d, etc)
✅ GET /api/assets/categories - returns 7 asset categories (ui, character, environment, vfx, audio, animation, misc)
✅ GET /api/build-farm/status - returns worker count and job stats
✅ GET /api/build-farm/workers - returns 3 workers list
✅ All 7 modular endpoints responding correctly (health, k8s, celery, deploy, audio, assets, build-farm)
✅ Frontend: Build Farm Panel renders with 'Distributed Build Farm' header
✅ Frontend: Workers (Alpha/Beta/Gamma) visible with idle status
✅ Frontend: Queue Prototype button available
✅ Frontend: 3D System Map renders with header and stats badges
✅ Frontend: View mode selector (radial, spiral, cluster, tree) visible
✅ Frontend: Labels and Refresh buttons visible
✅ Frontend: SystemVisualization3D component rendered (data-testid found)
✅ Frontend: No JavaScript console errors
critical_code_review_comments: Modular routes in /app/backend/routes/ directory are properly organized
K8s scaling endpoints return MOCKED data (k8s_available: false) since no K8s cluster
Celery routes work in fallback mode (celery_available: false, using memory queue)
Pure Three.js implementation in SystemVisualization3D.jsx avoids R3F reconciler issues
Build Farm Panel with 3 default workers (Alpha, Beta, Gamma) rendering correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Build Farm Panel, 3D System Map both working)

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test projects
context_for_next_testing_agent: All modular routes verified. K8s endpoints are MOCKED (no K8s cluster available). Celery endpoints work in fallback mode (Redis not running, using memory queue). Build Farm Panel and 3D System Map both rendering correctly. Previous iteration_16 tests still valid.

mocked_apis.K8s scaling: k8s_available: false - no K8s cluster configured
mocked_apis.Celery: celery_available: false - Redis not running, using memory queue fallback
